info._warning: yfinance is an unofficial scraper. DO NOT use for financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow). Use SEC EDGAR for financials.

financials_annual._warning: Yahoo Finance is an unofficial scraper. Financial statements may be stale, incomplete, or diverge from regulator filings. For JP tickers (.T), prefer edinet_client.py (primary-source 金融庁 Tier A) when EDINET_API_KEY is set.

financials_quarterly._warning: Yahoo Finance is an unofficial scraper. Financial statements may be stale, incomplete, or diverge from regulator filings. For JP tickers (.T), prefer edinet_client.py (primary-source 金融庁 Tier A) when EDINET_API_KEY is set.

capex.note: absolute value (yfinance reports as negative cash outflow)

kr_specific.primary_source_note: DART (전자공시시스템, dart.fss.or.kr) integration deferred. All canonical financials are yfinance Tier 2 (K-IFRS via Yahoo). KRW figures.
kr_specific.consolidated_basis_note: yfinance reports Korean issuers' consolidated (연결) statements by default. 별도 statements not exposed; needs DART for non-consolidated.

_provenance.primary_source_note: Korea has no primary-source equity client wired in data-kr yet. Tier A would be DART (전자공시시스템, dart.fss.or.kr) — integration deferred to a future minor version. Treat all financials below as unverified scraper output.
